reviews.review_title: Fun for first time vr users
reviews.review_description: If you are new to VR this could be a good starting point for you. Nothing too dramatic. simple graphics. it's kind of fun to play if you can get into it. Give it a shot if you're looking for something to play on your VR. Just don't expect too much.

Cube Vs. Spheres is a simple dodgeball like game, minus the dodge. This game was one of the first games I got on my Gear Vr back in June of 2016.
 I still play it today. Just because the game may be simple doesn't mean it's boring the increasing difficulty make the game fun and enjoyable. It has a comfortable feel and I never have ,nor my friends, experience any discomfort or motion sickness. The game is worth the money. It's also compatible with gamepad which is always a nice touch. This game is still on my top 3
